response: Thank you for your email. Today's event was indeed very interesting, and both the children, parents, and our teachers all enjoyed the rare opportunity. The positive outcome was largely due to your creative ideas, our team's quick response, and our coordinated support. What is most valuable is that every member of the team truly wished for the event to be a success. As you mentioned, this event had several areas for improvement, and to prevent similar issues in the future, I request that every teacher in the K2 team conduct a summary and reflection. At the same time, we should develop effective solutions to ensure such situations do not occur again, aiming to improve our school continuously.
